name: Columella Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the lettuce leaves. Cut or tear into bite-size pieces and place in a salad bowl.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl and toss lightly.
Note: Toasted sesame seeds can be substituted for walnuts. For a more authentic flavor, use only two lettuce leaves. Place them with the remaining green ingredients in a blender and blend well. Transfer to a mixing bowl, add the cheese and ground pepper. Form into a ball. Add vinegar and oil sparingly.
